existing_features.title: Split what was previously 'Part 5' of the multi-step flow (the frontend canister upgrade step in the rollout/onboarding wizard or guided flow) into two distinct sub-steps: Part 5a and Part 5b. Each sub-step must have its own dedicated screen or section with a clear title, description of the action to be taken, and a confirmation prompt that the user must explicitly acknowledge before proceeding to the next sub-step.
